message:
test(bd-137i): add unit tests for SSE event type, writer, reader, and transport coverage

Cover SseEventType round-trip and unknown values, empty data serialization,
writer event counter auto-increment, inner/inner_mut accessors, custom
write_comment, reader endpoint-skips-messages, server transport close,
and client transport send cancellation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
